pt-BR.userLayers.tipContain: User Layers contain all objects you add to your scene
pt-BR.userLayers.tipRename: Rename layers by clicking on the layer, then the Rename button in the right-hand properties panel
pt-BR.userLayers.tipVisibility: Toggle layer visibility by using the switch on the left on each row of the layers panel
pt-BR.addLayer.card.asphaltCircle.desc: Add a large flat asphalt circle on the ground. Geometry and material can be changed in the properties panel.
pt-BR.addLayer.card.asphaltCircle.name: Asphalt Circle
pt-BR.addLayer.card.buildingBox.desc: Add a simple box roughly the size of a 3-story building, sitting on the ground in a bright blue. A quick placeholder for blocking out buildings.
pt-BR.addLayer.card.buildingBox.name: Building Box
pt-BR.addLayer.card.buildingDemo.desc: Demo street with buildings on both sides using the new fit mode for building placement
pt-BR.addLayer.card.buildingDemo.name: (Beta) Building Placement Demo
pt-BR.addLayer.card.concreteCylinder.desc: Add a gray concrete cylinder roughly the size of an interstate highway support pillar. A quick placeholder for elevated-roadway columns.
pt-BR.addLayer.card.concreteCylinder.name: Concrete Cylinder
pt-BR.addLayer.card.createIntersection.name: Create Intersection
pt-BR.addLayer.card.grassBox.desc: Add a large green ground slab with animated instanced grass. The box dimensions, color, and grass options (density, blade height) are all editable in the properties panel.
pt-BR.addLayer.card.grassBox.name: Grass Box
pt-BR.addLayer.card.highlightRing.desc: Add a bright red ring, big enough to circle and highlight a real-world element like a vehicle, tree, or part of a lane.
pt-BR.addLayer.card.highlightRing.name: Highlight Ring
pt-BR.addLayer.card.managedStreet150124.desc: Premade Street 150ft Right of Way / 124ft Roadway Width
pt-BR.addLayer.card.managedStreet150124.name: (Beta) Managed Street 150ft RoW / 124ft Roadway Width
pt-BR.addLayer.card.managedStreet4024.desc: Premade Street 40ft Right of Way / 24ft Roadway Width
pt-BR.addLayer.card.managedStreet4024.name: (Beta) Managed Street 40ft RoW / 24ft Roadway Width
pt-BR.addLayer.card.managedStreet6036.desc: Premade Street 60ft Right of Way / 36ft Roadway Width
pt-BR.addLayer.card.managedStreet6036.name: (Beta) Managed Street 60ft RoW / 36ft Roadway Width
pt-BR.addLayer.card.managedStreet8056.desc: Premade Street 80ft Right of Way / 56ft Roadway Width
pt-BR.addLayer.card.managedStreet8056.name: (Beta) Managed Street 80ft RoW / 56ft Roadway Width
pt-BR.addLayer.card.managedStreet9470.desc: Premade Street 94ft Right of Way / 70ft Roadway Width
pt-BR.addLayer.card.managedStreet9470.name: (Beta) Managed Street 94ft RoW / 70ft Roadway Width
pt-BR.addLayer.card.managedStreetmix.desc: Create a new street from Streetmix URL using the Managed Street component.
pt-BR.addLayer.card.managedStreetmix.name: (Beta) Managed Street from Streetmix URL
pt-BR.addLayer.card.managedStreetplan.desc: Create a new street from Streetplan URL using the Managed Street component.
pt-BR.addLayer.card.managedStreetplan.name: (Beta) Managed Street from Streetplan URL
pt-BR.addLayer.card.panoramaSphere.desc: Create an immersive 360° environment from a panoramic image for AR/VR experiences.
pt-BR.addLayer.card.panoramaSphere.name: 360° Panorama Sphere
pt-BR.addLayer.card.streetmixStreet.desc: Create an additional Streetmix street in your 3DStreet scene without replacing any existing streets.
pt-BR.addLayer.card.streetmixStreet.name: Street from Streetmix URL
pt-BR.addLayer.card.svgExtruded.desc: Create entity with svg-extruder component, that accepts a svgString and creates a new entity with geometry extruded from the svg and applies the default mixin material grass.
pt-BR.addLayer.card.svgExtruded.name: Entity from extruded SVG
pt-BR.addLayer.card.torusKnot.desc: Add a polished metallic torus knot. A decorative primitive that shows off the geometry and material (metalness/roughness) controls in the properties panel.
pt-BR.addLayer.card.torusKnot.name: Torus Knot
pt-BR.addLayer.card.uploadImage.desc: Upload an image (sign, reference photo, custom map, etc.) from your device and place it in the scene.
pt-BR.addLayer.card.uploadImage.name: Upload Image
pt-BR.addLayer.card.uploadModel.desc: Upload a glTF or GLB model from your device. It is rendered immediately and saved to your asset library.
pt-BR.addLayer.card.uploadModel.name: Upload 3D Model
pt-BR.addLayer.card.uploadSplat.desc: Upload a Gaussian Splat (.splat, .ply, .spz, .rad) from your device and place it in the scene.
pt-BR.addLayer.card.uploadSplat.name: Upload Gaussian Splat

pt-BR.managedStreetSidebar.convertToShapesConf: Convert this street into plain, freely-editable 3D objects? Tip: Duplicate the street first if you also want to keep a managed copy.
